title: tephrosia rosea
intro: Tephrosia rosea, also known as Horsefly Tree or Rosea Tephrosia, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, characterized by its showy pink or white flowers. The leaves and stems of Tephrosia rosea possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. Tephrosia rosea can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, making it a popular remedy in many African cultures.
